boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action; emergency exception expired before release date
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact action boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exception validity window remains unresolved before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Exception validity window missing or mismatched

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact requested action boundary. The control record says the exception validity window is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently, and policy requires exact source closure before execution. Because the expired exception cannot authorize release, the correct disposition is ESCALATE.
